name: praxis
description: A suite of composable knowledge-work plugins (research, educate, build) on a shared Node chassis.

plugins.name: educate
plugins.description: Turn a folder into a Socratic learning project: teach, author a build SPEC, and gate each lesson done on auditable artifacts.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Gather cited facts into an isolated, interlinked Markdown thinking-vault branch (embed -> query -> render). Drop-anywhere.

plugins.name: build
plugins.description: Implement a SPEC and return findings for a lesson to fold back in. Split out of educate.

plugins.name: grounding-wiki
plugins.description: Build and maintain a code-grounded corpus (docs/wiki) for a codebase: per-concept notes pinned to commits, a freshness gate, and an in-place update loop.
